S.FORM: Bidhya Devi Bhandari I 1961 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 19 a romi'ad masofoc ci Bidhya Devi Bhandari, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Nepal anini i ci Bidhya Devi Bhandari, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 29 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: b~b~vi…¨~…ģńßja …¨~…ģ…ôb~vi b~b~vńßan…¨~…ģari i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~b~vi…¨~…ģńßja …¨~…ģ…ôb~vi b~b~vńßan…¨~…ģari, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u n…ôpa…ĺ anini i ¶i b~b~vi…¨~…ģńßja …¨~…ģ…ôb~vi b~b~vńßan…¨~…ģari, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Bidhya Devi Bhandari I 1961 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 19 a romi'ad masofoc ci Bidhya Devi Bhandari, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Nepal anini i ci Bidhya Devi Bhandari, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 29 a romi'ad.
